enrichment.summary: Kyle recaps a busy Friday that included physical labor (cleaning gutters), helping his mom with housework for $15, and late-night work on a digital project cataloging defunct Colorado ski resorts. He's exhausted and estimates he could finish the ski resort project within a day or two.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: proud of having a good track record estimating when he'll finish something
recognizes yawning during videos as a reliable signal he's genuinely exhausted
